site.name: MASON
site.tagline: Construction project control in one place.

hero.headline:
One command center
for construction control.
hero.subheadline: From BIM and schedule to RFIs, issues, and field logs — MASON brings the office and the jobsite into a single, permission-aware system, with an AI Concierge that knows your project.

stats.label:
BIM model opens
in any browser

testimonials.quote: The BIM viewer on a phone browser, without installing anything, is what convinced me. I have been fighting with Autodesk licences for years on projects where half the team just needs to look at the model, not author it. MASON just opens the model.
testimonials.name: Kwame O.

testimonials.quote: We switched from Procore mid-project. The migration was smoother than expected and the per-project pricing immediately saved us money because we were paying per-user on a 60-person site team. The AI Concierge was the unexpected benefit. Our RFI response time dropped from 9 days to 3 days.
testimonials.name: Fatima A.
testimonials.role: Senior Project Manager, Mixed-use Development, UAE

testimonials.quote: The offline mode on Android is what the field team needed. We work in underground structures with no signal for hours at a time. Daily logs, issue creation, and photo capture all work offline and sync the moment we come back above ground. No data lost.
testimonials.name: Marco S.

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.tagline: For small contractors and independent PMs

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.tagline: For growing GCs and project teams

tiers.name: Scale
tiers.tagline: For principal contractors and programme managers

enterprise.heading: Enterprise — custom contract
enterprise.body: Managing 50+ concurrent projects, integrating with a corporate ERP, or requiring a dedicated infrastructure tenant? We build custom contracts for large programmes. Contact us to discuss volume pricing, on-premises options, and dedicated support.

faq.q: What happens at the end of the 30-day trial?
faq.a: You'll receive an email on day 25 and day 30 reminding you to choose a plan. If you don't enter payment details by day 30, your account moves to read-only mode for 14 days — you can still export your data but cannot create new records. After 44 days total, the account is archived and your data is retained for 90 days before deletion.
Yes. Upgrading takes effect immediately — you're charged the prorated difference for the remainder of the billing period. Downgrading takes effect at the end of the current billing period.

faq.q: Is the per-project price per month or per year?
faq.a: The advertised prices ($49, $149, $399) are per project per month when billed monthly. Annual billing gives you 20% off — $39, $119, $319 per project per month, billed as an annual lump sum.
A project is a distinct contract or site. Sub-phases of the same contract can be managed within one project using MASON's phase/area structure — they don't need to be separate projects.

faq.q: Is there a discount for charities, NGOs, or developing markets?
faq.a: Yes. We offer 50% off for registered non-profit organisations and academic institutions, and adjusted pricing for teams based in lower-income countries. Contact us with your situation.

faq.q: Can I use MASON for just one project with no ongoing commitment?
faq.a: Yes. The Starter plan is month-to-month. Start, complete your project, export your data, cancel. You'll pay $49/month for the duration of the project.

faq.q: Do subcontractors need their own MASON subscription?
faq.a: No. Subcontractors are invited to your project by the main contractor. They operate as users on your subscription without a separate account.

faq.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a: Visa, Mastercard, and American Express via Stripe. For Scale tier and Enterprise customers, we also accept bank transfer / ACH / BACS on annual billing.

Monthly billing: refunds for the current month are available within 7 days of the billing date if you haven't meaningfully used the platform. Annual billing: pro-rated refund for unused months, less a 10% administration fee, if you cancel within the first 6 months.

Yes. Data is stored on infrastructure in the US with EU-region options on request. A Data Processing Agreement is available for Professional and Scale customers. We do not sell user data or use project data for AI training.
